channel.title: zzzzs on meorion
channel.description: Recent content in zzzzs on meorion

item.title: Differences That Might Mitigate Therapeutic Effects When Counseling Minorities
item.description: Most psychological approaches and techniques of psychology purport that they transcend culture and their delineations of solutions to problems are universally applicable (Corsini & Wedding, 1995; Hall, Lindzey, & Campbell, 1998). Demographic Data It is generally posited that differences between peoples can be a source of dissonance and misunderstanding - this can apply to the relationships between the therapist and client as well. Cultural Differences When therapists counsel those from other cultures…

item.title: Test 1
item.description: hearthstone count board clears vs mutanus, warning turn 7 mutanus - 7 mana. try to get high value cards out of your hand or dilute your hand with extra cards around turn seven versus control decks (control shamen, quest priest) TODO naga priest (new list from VS you should update)n deck imp warlock (looks to win turn 6.5) mulligan deck (demonic assault three damage) skeleton mage (look to win turn 9.

item.title: Why Study the Conditions of Other Cultures in the World?
Why and How Do Inequities Exist?
Selection of Mental Health Professionals, Training, Power, and Politics
World Mental Health of Minorities and the Poor
Analyses of Minority Mental Health Research
Mental Health Training and the Poor
Mental Health Training and the Poor
Minority Education, Training, and Community Development
mint update libreoffice, dhcp, ubuntu pro
item.description:
1. libreoffice https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-5661-1
    1. CVE-2022-26307
    2. CVE-2022-26306
    3. CVE-2022-26305
  2. isc-dhcp https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-5658-1
    1. CVE-2022-2928
    2. CVE-2022-2929
  3. ubuntu-advatage-tools
    1. LP: #1991173
    2. LP: #1990907
    3. LP: #1989279

Some of the ubuntu-advantage-tools changes were made to facilitate the change by canonical to the ubuntu pro product. Seems to mean businesses with less than five ubuntu licenses can recieve extended support for ubuntu versions that would normally not be supported (EoL). Possibly, this is centered mostly around security and applications they make available to install from their repository.

item.title: mint update - nodejs
item.description:
nodejs update to address:

  • CVE-2022-32212: DNS rebinding in –inspect on macOS (High)
  • CVE-2022-32213: bypass via obs-fold mechanic (Medium)
    • llhttp parser (https://github.com/nodejs/llhttp) incorrectly parses headers. looks related to 2022-35256
  • CVE-2022-35255: Weak randomness in WebCrypto keygen
  • CVE-2022-35256: HTTP Request Smuggling - Incorrect Parsing of Header Fields (Medium)

more details: https://nodejs.org/en/blog/vulnerability/september-2022-security-releases/

item.title: apt update (tiff)
item.description:
libtiff5 had some security patches

ubuntu had a kernel update (bump abi)

item.title: apt update (libpoppler)
item.description:
• effects libtiff. a DoS via a crafted tiff file.

ubuntu https://ubuntu.com/security/CVE-2022-0908
debian https://security-tracker.debian.org/tracker/CVE-2022-0908

  • effects libtiff. a DoS via a crafted tiff file.

ubuntu https://ubuntu.com/security/CVE-2022-0907
debian https://security-tracker.debian.org/tracker/CVE-2022-0907

  • CVE-2022-38784. effects poppler. integer overflow in the JBIG2 decoder

ubuntu https://ubuntu.com/security/CVE-2022-38784
debian https://security-tracker.debian.org/tracker/CVE-2022-38784

casper (bug. can’t skip install integrity test)

item.title: Soft glow four eyes, two pair
apt update libxslt
item.description:
libxslt security issues reported in chromium browser
XSLT: Extensible Stylesheet Language Transformations
xml language to style your xml/rss feed.

https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libxslt/-/wikis/home

CVE-2021-30560
ubuntu https://ubuntu.com/security/CVE-2021-30560
debian https://security-tracker.debian.org/tracker/CVE-2021-30560

item.title: apt update (rsync/zlib)
item.description:
rsync (used for backups and file transfers) https://github.com/WayneD/rsync/
rsync comes bundled with zlib (closed issue, addressing):
https://github.com/WayneD/rsync/issues/347

ubuntu https://ubuntu.com/security/CVE-2022-37434
debian https://security-tracker.debian.org/tracker/CVE-2022-37434

item.title: apt update (kernel and samba)
item.description: Linux Kernel, Samba, and Net-SNMP vulnerabilites were addressed.

item.title: apt update (libmysqlclient21)
item.description:
libmysqlclient21:i386 (security)
libmysqlclient21:amd64 (security)

  • oracle released their cumulative critical patch update for the quarter.

item.title: seeking fitness advice
item.description: Long story short, I have a baby chimp for the next couple months. What is the best routine to make him swole by the end of summer?

item.title: apt update (python3-bottle)
item.description:
wireless-regdb (updated database of country wifi channels/bands)
python3-bottle (security) incorrectly handles errors during early request bindings

item.title: Qs and As
item.description:
Charizard is the most potent of all the variations of the base charmander oeuvre and all its branches. that is not in question. We aren’t debating that.
But, it does bring up another question. and I think we have the answer
(updated: Jul-28th 2022, Jul-24th 2022, Jul-15th 2022. original 2022-06-25)

item.title: sera
item.description: IN-PROGRESS One-pager Sera POV one pager sera working 200-500 words Figure 1: lying down Sera was born in the wreckage of the sleeper star ship, Meridian. The ship collided with an undetected satellite in their destination solar system. She grew up looking at Annie. A girl lying motionless, face shiny, nose slightly wrinkled, honey colored hair in her stasis pod. Both of them under the watch of the Meridian’s AI, Joyce.

item.title: apt update (libfreetype6)
item.description:
• python3-jwt (security update) signing key confusion
  • libfreetype6 (security update) heap buffer overflow

item.title: apt update (python)
item.description:

  • python3.8 (security update) injection attack

item.title: apt update (nodejs, nss)
item.description: nodejs (updated to 16.16.0). code (updated to 1.69) and libnss3 () updated

item.title: toughtalk
item.description:
An Introduction

There are times when some things need to be said. That is the purpose of toughtalk, hashtag-toughtalk.

item.title: apt update (openssl, gnupg)
item.description: openssl (could leak info over the network) and gnupg (could allow forged signatures) updated

item.title: Clooney
item.description: Cloononian, would sum up my philosophy. I would list him and Faulkner as my biggest influences. A doctor, I saw, said it sounds like encephalitis. My inner personal pint size clooney wanted to argue, so I decided to shut up and let him. melting clocks. talking raisins. a lot of fun. Fear? No. That’s not how I would describe it. Eroticism? You can bet your bottom bacon, we weren’t going to find out.

item.title: mom's journal
item.description: Chant and then encant enchant. Spoke and then encant enspoke.

item.title: Stricken City
item.description: I wanted to see. I wanted to be there. That far off there. The perptually perfect. Something to behold. Not now. No time. Today was the day the world would end. Their world. He would see it. His world, of course would go on. Some of them would go on, too. but not as they know it. Not as they have known it. Dusty. Windy. Desolate. a glint of reflection. something reflecting.

item.title: apt update - cURL was updated today.
item.description:
• curl
  • libcurl3-gnutls [amd64]
  • libcurl3-gnutls [i386]
  • libcurl4

curl Description: command line tool for transferring data with URL syntax

cURL was updated. Four vulnerabilities were patched

item.title: apt update - libmbmim was patched today
Section
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
